settings.title: Valentine's Pickup Windows Are Open for Booking
settings.excerpt: Reserve a time, skip the line, and tell us if you would rather we surprise you.
settings.body:
Our busiest day of the year is nearly here, so Petalry is taking Valentine's bookings now to keep things calm.

Choose a pickup window when you order and your bouquet will be wrapped and waiting, no line to stand in. Delivery slots are filling, so the sooner the better.

Why we book it in windows

Valentine's is the one day we cannot simply make everything to order on the spot. The volume is too high and the flowers too time-sensitive. Booking a window lets us schedule the work so your bouquet is arranged close to your pickup time, wrapped, and set aside with your name on it. You walk in, collect it, and leave, while everyone who turned up hoping for the best waits in a line out the door. Reserving ahead is genuinely the difference between a calm collection and a stressful one.

If you would rather not decide on the flowers yourself, that is welcome too. Tell us a little about the person and we will take it from there.

To make the day easy

  • Pick a pickup window when you order so your bouquet is ready and waiting.
  • Book delivery early, as those slots fill first.
  • Tell us a color, a feeling, and a budget if you want us to surprise you.

If you are unsure what to send, leave it to us. Tell us a color or a feeling and a budget, and we will build something for the person you have in mind. The earlier you book, the more we can do with it.
